questions.q: Vijay Sethupathi made his lead breakthrough in this 2012 critically acclaimed horror-thriller directed by Kiruthiga Udhayanidhi.
AR Rahman's debut Hindi film score was for this 1995 Ram Gopal Varma film starring Urmila Matondkar.
Madhavan and Shalini starred in this 2000 Mani Ratnam film about a love affair between strangers on a train.
Dhanush made his acting debut in 2002 in a film his own father directed. Name that debut film.
Tamil cinema's first Cinemascope film, released in 1955, starred Gemini Ganesan and was directed by B.S. Ranga. Name it.
